title: Purpose
doc_html:
§4742. Purpose

            The purpose of this Part is to protect consumers from misleading and false labeling of food products that are edible by humans.

            Acts 2019, No. 273, §1, eff. Oct 1, 2020.
doc_text:
§4742. Purpose
The purpose of this Part is to protect consumers from misleading and false labeling
of food products that are edible by humans.
Acts 2019, No. 273, §1, eff. Oct 1, 2020.
